user_query: I want to surprise my friends with a golf trip. Can you provide me with the latest odds for the upcoming golf matches? Also, find some golf courses within a 10-mile radius in our city with their course details, so we can plan our trip accordingly.

TaskList.description: Fetch the latest odds for upcoming golf matches.
Identify golf courses within a 10-mile radius in the specified city.
Retrieve detailed information for each golf course found in step 2, including amenities and booking details.
